name: Lucanidae
diagnosis: Stag beetles are a group of about 1,200 species of beetles in the family Lucanidae, presently classified in four subfamilies. Some species grow up to over 12 cm (4.7 in), but most are about 5 cm (2.0 in).

genus_notes.platycerus: Platycerus is a genus of stag beetles (Lucanidae), belonging to the subfamily Lucaninae.
genus_notes.dorcus: Dorcus is a genus in the stag beetle subfamily Lucaninae and typical of the tribe Dorcini.
genus_notes.ceruchus: Ceruchus is a genus of stag beetles in the family Lucanidae.
genus_notes.nicagus: Nicagus is a genus of stag beetles in the family Lucanidae: representing the monogeneric tribe Nicagini in the subfamily Aesalinae.
